bangalore.delivery_areas: Whitefield, Koramangala, Indiranagar, Electronic City, HSR Layout, BTM Layout, Marathahalli, Hebbal, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, MG Road, Sarjapur Road, Bellandur, Yelahanka, Banashankari, Rajajinagar, Malleshwaram
bangalore.hero_subheading: Bangalore's trusted trophy and award manufacturer since two decades. Same-day pickup in Bengaluru, free delivery within city on orders above Rs 2,000, and laser-engraved customisation done in-house at our Gandhinagar workshop.
bangalore.local_seo_paragraph:
Buying Trophies in Bangalore — What You Need to Know

Meru Trophy is headquartered at #273/2, SC Road, 2nd Cross, Gandhinagar, Bangalore 560 009, a five-minute walk from the Annamma Temple and a short auto ride from Majestic and the City Railway Station. Being a Bengaluru-based manufacturer rather than a reseller means every crystal trophy, acrylic award, metal sports cup, wooden memento and medal is produced, engraved and quality-checked in our own facility. Walk-in customers can pick designs, approve laser-engraving proofs and collect orders the same day — something importers and online-only sellers simply cannot match.

Why Bangalore customers choose Meru Trophy

  • Same-day pickup from Gandhinagar for stock trophies and medals
  • Free delivery across Bengaluru on orders above Rs 2,000
  • In-house 2D and 3D laser engraving, UV printing and logo die-casting
  • Low MOQs — 10 pieces from stock, 100 pieces for fully custom designs
  • Transparent pricing — medals from Rs 150, crystal trophies Rs 500 to Rs 5,000+

Areas we deliver across Bengaluru

We serve every major neighbourhood including Whitefield, Koramangala, Indiranagar, Electronic City, HSR Layout, BTM Layout, Marathahalli, Hebbal, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, MG Road, Sarjapur Road and Bellandur, plus the outer corridors of Yelahanka, Banashankari and Rajajinagar. Bulk corporate orders for the IT corridor are dispatched within 24-48 hours of artwork approval.

Popular among Bangalore's biggest industries

Meru Trophy is a preferred supplier to IT corporates — Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Accenture and Microsoft India offices regularly order crystal trophies for retirement and long-service awards. We supply hackathon prizes to early-stage startups in Koramangala and HSR, sports trophies to Indian Cricket School and Karnataka State sporting bodies, and engraved mementos to premier institutions like IISc, IIM Bangalore, RV College of Engineering, Christ University and BMS College of Engineering. Defence and research clients with ties to DRDO, HAL and ISRO order specialised die-cast metal awards from us each year.

Common occasions in Bangalore

  • Annual day awards and long-service recognition at MNC campuses
  • Hackathon, ideathon and demo-day prizes for startups
  • School and college sports day medals and trophies
  • Convocation and academic excellence awards
  • Religious functions and temple felicitations
  • Cricket and corporate tournament cups

Message us on WhatsApp at +91 78922 07252 or call +91 94801 50888 for a quote, design samples and same-day pickup from our Gandhinagar showroom.

hyderabad.delivery_areas: Hitec City, Madhapur, Gachibowli, Kondapur, Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, Secunderabad, Kukatpally, Begumpet, Ameerpet, Miyapur, Uppal, LB Nagar, Kothapet
hyderabad.hero_subheading: Crystal trophies, acrylic awards and customised medals delivered from Bangalore to Hyderabad in 3-5 days. Trusted by Cyberabad IT campuses, Telangana pharma majors and the city's top colleges for fully engraved, ready-to-present awards.
hyderabad.local_seo_paragraph:
Buying Trophies in Hyderabad — What You Need to Know

Meru Trophy ships customised trophies, medals and corporate awards from our Bangalore manufacturing unit to every part of Hyderabad and Secunderabad. Orders dispatched from Gandhinagar, Bengaluru typically reach Hyderabad within 3-5 working days by road or surface courier, and air-courier options are available for urgent deliveries. Because we manufacture everything in-house, our Hyderabad clients deal directly with the factory — no middleman markups, no quality surprises.

Why Hyderabad customers choose Meru Trophy

  • Direct-from-factory pricing — medals from Rs 150, crystal awards Rs 500 to Rs 5,000+
  • 2D and 3D laser engraving with proof shared on WhatsApp before production
  • UV printing for full-colour company logos on acrylic and crystal
  • MOQs as low as 10 pieces for stock designs, 100 pieces for fully custom
  • 5-10 day pan-India delivery, with 3-5 days typical for Hyderabad

Areas we deliver across Hyderabad

We ship to the entire Cyberabad IT corridor — Hitec City, Madhapur, Gachibowli, Kondapur — plus the premium neighbourhoods of Banjara Hills and Jubilee Hills, the twin city of Secunderabad, and high-density residential zones like Kukatpally, Begumpet, Ameerpet, Miyapur, Uppal and LB Nagar. Bulk corporate orders are couriered door-to-door with tracking shared on WhatsApp.

Popular among Hyderabad's biggest industries

The Cyberabad IT corridor — home to Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Meta and Apple India campuses — is one of our largest sources of crystal trophy orders for annual recognition events. Hyderabad's pharma majors including Dr. Reddy's, Aurobindo and Divi's Laboratories regularly commission long-service awards and R&D excellence trophies. We also supply T-Hub startups, GMR and GVK group functions, and customised medals to school sports days and college fests such as Felicity at IIIT-Hyderabad, BITS Hyderabad, ISB and Osmania University.

Common occasions in Hyderabad

  • Annual day and Founder's Day awards in Cyberabad IT campuses
  • Pharma R&D and patent-filing recognition awards
  • School and inter-school sports day medals
  • College fest trophies — Felicity, Atmos, BITS Atmosphere
  • Telugu cultural and association felicitations
  • Corporate cricket and badminton tournament cups

For a quote, design mockup or bulk-order discount, WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 or call +91 94801 50888 — our team responds within working hours and can email a proof the same day.

delhi.delivery_areas: Connaught Place, Karol Bagh, Lajpat Nagar, Saket, Vasant Kunj, Dwarka, Rohini, Pitampura, Gurgaon (Cyber Hub, Udyog Vihar, Golf Course Road), Noida (Sectors 15-65), Greater Noida, Faridabad, Ghaziabad
delhi.hero_subheading: Pan-India trophy and award manufacturer serving Delhi NCR — Gurgaon, Noida, Faridabad and Ghaziabad — with custom crystal, acrylic and metal trophies delivered in 4-6 days from our Bangalore factory. Trusted by ministries, PSUs, IIT Delhi and top consulting firms.
delhi.local_seo_paragraph:
Buying Trophies in Delhi NCR — What You Need to Know

Meru Trophy supplies engraved trophies, medals and corporate awards to every corner of the National Capital Region. Orders are dispatched from our Bangalore headquarters at Gandhinagar and reach Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida, Faridabad and Ghaziabad within 4-6 working days via road logistics, or 1-2 days via air courier for time-critical conferences and convocations. Because we are the manufacturer, our NCR clients get factory-direct pricing with no reseller margin added.

Why Delhi NCR customers choose Meru Trophy

  • Direct-from-factory rates — medals from Rs 150, crystal trophies Rs 500 to Rs 5,000+
  • 2D and 3D laser engraving, UV printing, logo die-casting all done in-house
  • Bulk-friendly MOQs — 10 stock pieces, 100 for custom designs with volume discounts
  • Air-courier dispatch available for last-minute prize-day and conference orders
  • Government and PSU billing support with GST invoicing and PO acceptance

Areas we deliver across Delhi NCR

We ship across central Delhi — Connaught Place, Karol Bagh, Lajpat Nagar, Saket, Vasant Kunj, Dwarka, Rohini and Pitampura — and cover the full NCR including Gurgaon (Cyber Hub, Udyog Vihar, Golf Course Road, Sohna Road), Noida (Sectors 15 to 65), Greater Noida, Faridabad and Ghaziabad. Hotel-direct deliveries to ITC Maurya, Taj Palace, The Leela and Hyatt Regency are routine for our annual conference clients.

Popular among Delhi NCR's biggest industries

Delhi is India's policy and PSU capital, and Meru Trophy is a regular supplier to government departments and public-sector undertakings — NTPC, ONGC, GAIL, SAIL, BHEL and IOCL — for Republic Day, Independence Day and annual recognition functions. Major media houses including NDTV, The Times of India and India Today order custom acrylic trophies for their award nights. The Big-4 consulting firms (Deloitte, EY, PwC, KPMG) in Gurgaon and the IT clusters in Noida are repeat clients for long-service and quarterly performance awards. Premier institutions such as IIT Delhi, Delhi University, JNU, AIIMS and FMS Delhi commission engraved mementos for convocations and prize-day ceremonies.

Common occasions in Delhi NCR

  • Republic Day and Independence Day government awards
  • PSU long-service and retirement felicitations
  • Corporate annual conferences at ITC Maurya, Taj Palace and Hyatt
  • Convocation and academic excellence awards at IIT/DU/JNU
  • Media and advertising award nights
  • NGO and advocacy recognition events

For bulk quotes, GST-compliant invoicing or rush delivery to NCR, WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 or call +91 94801 50888 — our team handles PO-based orders and ships pan-India daily.

mumbai.delivery_areas: Bandra, Andheri East, Andheri West, Powai, Lower Parel, BKC, Worli, Nariman Point, Colaba, Dadar, Navi Mumbai (Vashi, Belapur, Nerul), Thane, Mulund, Borivali, Pune corridor
mumbai.hero_subheading: Premium crystal trophies, acrylic awards and corporate gifts shipped from Bangalore to Mumbai in 4-6 days. Trusted by BFSI majors in BKC, media houses in Andheri, IIT Bombay and pharma HQs across Lower Parel and Worli.
mumbai.local_seo_paragraph:
Buying Trophies in Mumbai — What You Need to Know

Meru Trophy ships customised trophies, mementos, medals and corporate gifts from our Bangalore manufacturing facility at Gandhinagar to every part of Mumbai and the wider Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Dispatch via road cargo or surface courier reaches Mumbai in 4-6 working days, and air-courier options are available when an awards night or convocation date does not allow margin for delay. As a direct manufacturer, we offer Mumbai's BFSI, media and pharma clients factory-direct pricing without the markups that local resellers add.

Why Mumbai customers choose Meru Trophy

  • Manufacturer pricing — medals from Rs 150, crystal awards Rs 500 to Rs 5,000+
  • In-house laser engraving (2D and 3D), UV printing and logo die-casting
  • Low MOQs — 10 pieces stock, 100 pieces custom — ideal for boutique agencies and film events
  • Pan-India shipping with proof-of-design approval on WhatsApp before production
  • Bulk Diwali corporate-gifting orders accepted from August onward

Areas we deliver across Mumbai

We ship to all of South and Central Mumbai — Nariman Point, Colaba, Worli, Lower Parel, Dadar — the western suburbs of Bandra, Andheri East, Andheri West and BKC, the IT and corporate hub of Powai, and the satellite cities of Navi Mumbai (Vashi, Belapur, Nerul), Thane, Mulund and Borivali. We also serve the Pune corridor on the same dispatch schedule.

Popular among Mumbai's biggest industries

Mumbai is India's financial capital, and Meru Trophy supplies engraved crystal awards to HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Kotak Mahindra and JP Morgan India for their annual top-performer and long-service recognition. Media and entertainment houses — Star India, Sony Pictures, Yash Raj Films — order custom acrylic trophies for film festivals and internal award nights, and the Bollywood fraternity occasionally commissions bespoke pieces for private events. Pharma headquarters in Mumbai — Sun Pharma, Lupin and Cipla — are repeat clients for R&D and sales excellence awards. We also serve the BSE and NSE communities, leading advertising agencies (Ogilvy, JWT, FCB) and premier educational institutions including IIT Bombay, JBIMS and NMIMS for convocation and prize-day mementos.

Common occasions in Mumbai

  • BFSI annual top-performer and long-service awards
  • Diwali corporate gifting peaks in October and November
  • Film festival and media award nights in Andheri and Bandra
  • Pharma R&D and sales excellence recognition
  • Convocation and prize-day awards at IIT Bombay, NMIMS, JBIMS
  • Advertising agency client and creative-team felicitations

For sample images, a bulk quote or a Diwali corporate-gifting catalogue, WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 or call +91 94801 50888 — we share design proofs the same day and dispatch within 48 hours of approval.
